text:
On Tue, Jan 08, 2002 at 07:46:15AM -0800, des@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Perl 5.00503 interpreter crashes with a signal 11
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: des
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jan 8 07:46:15 PST 2002
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Does this problem still occur on newer FreeBSD releases?

Yes.  It is a problem with Berkeley DB v. 1, not with Perl.

Cheers,
+Anton.
